history.content: Please create a children's picture book in 简体中文. Story idea: 彩虹尽头有什么, 一个小兔子想知道，它离开了妈妈，勇敢地向前奔跑，遇到了许多伙伴，一起寻找答案。一个关于勇气的故事，给10岁小朋友，10页
Saved picture book to ./books\彩虹尽头有什么\picturebook.pdf (10 pages).
Please create a children's picture book in English. Story idea: 彩虹尽头有什么, 一个小兔子想知道，它离开了妈妈，勇敢地向前奔跑，遇到了许多伙伴，一起寻找答案。一个关于勇气的故事，给10岁小朋友，10页，需要切换场景，主角不要总是占据图片的大部分

Please create a children's picture book in English. Story idea: once upon a time, there is a little boy, who wants to know why stars shine. He asked his mother, she just smiled, but she said she doesn't know. The he asked his father, and his grandpa and grandma, but nobody could answer him with a real answer. So he decided to find the answer himself, he walk through the rivers, climed to the top of the highest moutains in his country. He was very happy to see a cluster of stars, they told this curious boy, they shine because they were trying to smile to the people of this world. Help me to rich this story, use detailed prompts to generate the picture book. With 15 pages for 8 years old boy.
